text:
Market today: No direct market-wide drivers for your tech/chip names from today's headlines. The broader market might be watching financial sector strength or geopolitical oil news, but these don't directly move your book.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down -37.71% and flagged SELL; its leveraged nature means this loss is amplified. SPAL, another leveraged ETF, is also deeply in the red (-48.51%). QQQI is flagged TRIM and is close to its stop at 52. Remember, margin amplifies all these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on ZS and MSFT, both showing strong daily/4H/1H upward bias and trading in a daily discount according to your scanner.

Bottom line: Focus intensely on managing risk in your leveraged, deeply underwater positions.
plays: SOXL: Down -37.71% and flagged SELL. Seriously consider respecting your 200 stop or trimming exposure to reduce margin risk.
SPAL: Down -48.51% and leveraged. Review your 21.38 stop to protect capital, as margin amplifies these significant drops.
QQQI: Flagged TRIM and near its 52 stop. Consider reducing position size if it breaks that level.
